FlavourText.en: Incredible might has always laid buried within you. Now is the time to rise.
FlavourText.zh: 身负惊世骇俗之力，如今正是奋起之时。

FlavourText.en: Your home has been threatened. A good man must be roused to war.
FlavourText.zh: 家园危在旦夕，义士挺身而战。

FlavourText.en: You hunger for power, and by force of arms, you will take it.
FlavourText.zh: 力量令你如饥似渴，你将凭借刀兵将其夺得。

FlavourText.en: A woman can change the world with a single well-placed arrow.
FlavourText.zh: 只需一箭，便可改变世界的女人。

FlavourText.en: There are venoms and virtues aplenty in the wilds, if you know where to look.
FlavourText.zh: 荒野中充满了恶毒与美善，只要你知道在何处寻找。

FlavourText.en: You became a weapon of war so that others could live in peace.
FlavourText.zh: 为了让旁人和平安居，你甘愿化身为战争的武器。

FlavourText.en: You were chosen by the Sacred Wisps to enact the Spirit's will.
FlavourText.zh: 你被圣洁鬼灵选中，以践行万灵的意志。

FlavourText.en: Corruption cost you your home, but taught you so much more...
FlavourText.zh: 腐化令你失去了家园，又投以智慧作为回报……

FlavourText.en: You seek power at any cost... and there is no price too high to pay.
FlavourText.zh: 不计代价地追寻力量……多少代价都不足吝惜。

FlavourText.en: Your search for power took you on a journey inwards.
FlavourText.zh: 追求力量的旅程，通往了你的内心。

FlavourText.en: Death is your domain, your flesh merely a material to be mastered.
FlavourText.zh: 死亡是你的领域，血肉不过是有待掌控的耗材。

FlavourText.en: The Well of Souls is yours to command.
FlavourText.zh: 灵魂之井由你掌控。

FlavourText.en: The rumble of thunder heralds your approach. Woe to those that draw your ire.
FlavourText.zh: 电闪雷鸣宣告着你的降临，狂徒鼠辈必将饱尝灾祸。

FlavourText.en: The tapestry of time is yours to weave; an element you alone may master.
FlavourText.zh: 时光的织缕任你编织，唯你掌控。

FlavourText.en: By your command, they will earn redemption...one duty at a time.
FlavourText.zh: 遵你命令，他们将完成一项项任务……逐步获得救赎。

FlavourText.en: Countless wars have left you with skills somewhat resembling a decent officer...
FlavourText.zh: 经历无数场战争的洗礼，你已和精锐的军官别无二致……

FlavourText.en: There's something very wrong with this world... and you're going to fix it.
FlavourText.zh: 横行世间的不义……将由你拨乱反正。

FlavourText.en: The more you embrace virtue gems, the more power they offer...
FlavourText.zh: 向古灵宝石献出身心，它们也会赋予你力量……

FlavourText.en: There are many paths to achieve your goals... and you see them all.
FlavourText.zh: 达成目标有多种途径……皆在你洞悉之下。

FlavourText.en:
Wraeclast has suffered for too long.
You are vengeance incarnate.
FlavourText.zh:
瓦尔克拉斯的苦难绵亘太久。
你就是复仇的化身。

FlavourText.en: They made you a human weapon... but that strength has set you free.
FlavourText.zh: 他们把你锻造成人形兵器……但那份力量，却让你挣脱了枷锁。

FlavourText.en: True strength lies within. One must only focus... and believe.
FlavourText.zh: 真正的力量源于内心，你只需全神贯注……坚守信念。

FlavourText.en: The truth of your faith threatens to break your very soul... but in that struggle lies power beyond belief.
FlavourText.zh: 追随的真相令你的内心摇摇欲坠……挣扎中却蕴藏着超乎想象的力量。
